languages.text: {n}Сервочереп угрюмо молчит. Его глазницы пусты, как оскверненная могила.{/n}
{n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сервочереп угрюмо молчит. Его глазницы пусты, как оскверненная могила.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El servocráneo guarda un ominoso silencio. Las cuencas de sus ojos parecen tan vacías como una tumba profanada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El servocráneo guarda un ominoso silencio. Las cuencas de sus ojos parecen tan vacías como una tumba profanada.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伺服头骨阴森地沉默着。他的眼窝空洞，如同被亵渎的坟墓。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le servocrâne reste silencieux. Ses orbites sont aussi vides qu'une tombe profanée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmelete kasvetli bir sessizlik hâkim. Göz çukurları, saygısızlığa uğramış bir mezar kadar boş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Servoschädel schweigt. Seine Augenhöhlen sind leer wir ein geplündertes Grab.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Servoschädel schweigt. Seine Augenhöhlen sind leer wir ein geplündertes Grab.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーヴォスカルは陰鬱に沈黙している。その眼窩は、暴かれた墓のように虚ろだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The servo-skull is grimly silent. His eye sockets are as empty as a desecrated grave.{/n}
